summary: Completed comprehensive testing of NPD Tracker SaaS application. All major features working correctly including dashboard metrics, filtering, navigation, CRUD operations, and API endpoints.
passed_tests: Dashboard loads with correct metrics (6 total, 2 on-track, 2 at-risk, 2 delayed, 0 completed)
Status filter buttons work correctly (All, On Track, At Risk, Delayed, Completed)
Type filter buttons work correctly (NPD, Gift Kit, CPR)
Search functionality works (finds projects by name)
Project card navigation to detail page works
Project detail page tabs work (Phases & Steps, Team View, Packaging, Blockers)
Sidebar navigation works for all pages (Dashboard, Timeline, Color Bank, Manufacturers)
Create new project via modal works
Timeline Analysis page loads with metrics and charts
Color Bank page shows 5 seeded colors and allows adding new ones
Manufacturers page shows 3 seeded manufacturers with star ratings
All API endpoints work: GET /api/projects, GET /api/colors, GET /api/manufacturers, GET /api/analytics/metrics
Backend API CRUD operations work: Create, Read, Update, Delete for projects, colors, manufacturers
Project phase and step management works
Dark mode SaaS aesthetic implemented correctly
